header.title: Safe Space
header.quickExitAria: Quick exit — leave the page immediately

disclaimer.title: Before we start talking
disclaimer.notMedical: This is not medical or psychological advice.
disclaimer.intro: I'm a space for conversation and emotional support — I don't replace a therapist, doctor or emergency services.
disclaimer.needHelpNow: If you need help right now
disclaimer.privacyNote: Your conversation lives only in this browser tab. Once you close it or clear data — it's gone for good.
disclaimer.consent: I understand and accept the terms above. I know that in a life-threatening situation I will call the emergency number {{emergency}}.
disclaimer.accept: I agree — enter the safe space

chat.greeting: Hi. I'm here to listen. There's no rush — write however feels comfortable. What brought you here today?
chat.footerNote: Your conversation stays only in this tab. Close it = it disappears.
chat.clearedDesc: All messages have been wiped from this tab.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.breakSuggestion: It looks like we've been talking for a while. Maybe it's worth taking a break? Remember, you can always talk to a real person if you need support. How are you feeling?

replies: I hear you. What you're describing sounds really heavy. Would you like to tell me more about what you're feeling right now?
Thank you for telling me this. You are safe here. What weighs on you the most today?
I understand. Sometimes just naming what's inside takes enormous courage. What do you feel in your body right now?
I'm here with you in this conversation. Remember — if thoughts of harming yourself appear, you can call your local emergency number right away.
mock.crisis: What you're writing matters deeply to me. Your life matters. Please call {{emergency}} or {{trustline}} (helpline) right now. You can also press the “Quick exit” button if you need to leave this page.
